A.text: t moves upward, away from the pad, without touching the trench.

B.text: It spreads along the trench, away from the rocket.

C.text: It remains confined to a narrow column beneath the nozzle.

parsed.answer_value: It spreads along the trench, away from the rocket.
parsed.rationale: The exhaust plume initially appears to spread along the trench, moving away from the rocket. This is evident from the visual expansion of the plume in the frames following ignition.
